acceptance_criteria: A new top-level onboarding command (or equivalent guided flow) walks users through quickstart and advanced setup paths.
A non-interactive mode supports scripted setup with explicit flags and deterministic exit codes.
When config is invalid or legacy, onboarding halts with actionable remediation through existing ao doctor pathways.
Onboarding writes configuration only through AO service APIs/commands and never requires manual .ao JSON edits.
Automated tests cover first-run setup, rerun-with-keep behavior, and safe reset behavior.
description:
Operators can bootstrap AO consistently on a clean machine or repo using a guided CLI flow that configures project root, runner/daemon defaults, model setup, and safety settings without manual file edits.

Implementation boundary: orchestrator-cli UX and config orchestration only; no desktop-wrapper dependencies.
title: Add guided onboarding and configuration wizard for AO
